title: Come Fill the Cup
writer: Ivan Goff, Ben Roberts, Harlan Ware
actors: James Cagney, Phyllis Thaxter, Raymond Massey
plot: Alcoholic newspaperman Lew Marsh hits bottom, loses his job and is rehabilitated by Charley Dolan. After six years on the wagon he gets his job back and devotes himself to other recovering alcoholics. His boss enlists his help to ...
